final_prompt.prompt:
Create a design system UI kit for web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include web Dashboard layout, mobile interface screens, card components, button variants, and control elements as a cohesive design system
Subject: must include UI components: Dashboard interface, mobile screens, cards, buttons, form controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a cool futuristic tech atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a rich layered tech direction — exact color values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek tech surface treatment — exact finishes are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
